name: logistics coordinators managing 10-20 shipments/week tool
description: For logistics coordinators processing 10-20 shipments/week, delays in shipment status cause late orders. We provide real-time updates instead of manual tracking through emails and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Lack of real-time visibility into shipment status
features: manual entry option for missing data
